text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! What do you mean "to be continued"?! How
could you not catch the culprit?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now I have to watch the next episode...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, is it already midnight? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Then I'll just watch one more episode. This will be the last...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
To be continued again?! How is that even
possible?! Rrrgh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'll simply have to see it through to the end! Just
make sure you actually catch the culprit this time,
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I hear that King Halo was up all
night binging a TV show.
